overall.description: Atmospheric third-person game footage showing a character swimming through foggy industrial waters toward massive pillars, then exploring a platform structure. The scene features heavy fog, muted desaturated colors, and imposing industrial architecture emerging from the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water with massive industrial pillars in fog

events.description: character briefly submerges below water surface then resurfaces while swimming
industrial platform structure becomes visible through fog on the left

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through foggy water toward massive industrial pillars in the distance

entered.detail: massive cylindrical industrial towers with red internal lighting visible through heavy fog
industrial platform structure with orange railings emerging from the fog

segments.scene_description: The character swims through dark, foggy water toward massive industrial pillars looming in the distance. Around the 10-second mark, an industrial platform becomes visible on the left side. The character briefly ducks under the water's surface before continuing forward, maintaining a steady pace through the rippling water.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial platform deck with safety railings over water

events.description: character climbs out of water onto the industrial platform deck
character turns left toward illuminated door then turns back to face the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial platform, examining the surroundings and looking out at the foggy water

entered.detail: orange metal safety railings lining the edge of the platform
large blue cylindrical barrels stacked near the platform edge
illuminated metal door with bright white light emanating from within
orange and white traffic cone on the platform deck

segments.scene_description: The character climbs onto the industrial platform, revealing metal decking, orange safety railings, and blue storage barrels. The character walks along the platform, briefly approaching an illuminated metal door before turning to look out at the foggy water and distant pillars. The environment features industrial equipment including a traffic cone and fire safety boxes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a submerged swim through murky industrial waters to the exploration of a metallic platform. It begins with the character swimming through dark, foggy water toward massive pillars looming in the distance, briefly ducking beneath the rippling surface. As the character moves forward, an industrial platform emerges from the mist on the left, leading to a transition where the character climbs out of the water and onto the metal decking. The scene then shifts to a walking perspective across the platform, passing orange safety railings, blue storage barrels, and fire safety equipment. Finally, the camera approaches an illuminated metal door before turning back toward the foggy expanse and the distant, imposing pillars.
